sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?amount 

WHERE {?fee rdf:type :Registration_fee; :Price ?amount}
sql_query:
SELECT fees.price  
FROM registration_fees JOIN fees ON registration_fees.id = fees.id

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?chair) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?chair rdf:type :Program_Chair}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?title 

WHERE {?c rdf:type :Abstract; :hasTitle ?title}

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?abs) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?abs rdf:type :Abstract}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?fee) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?fee rdf:type :Registration_fee}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?participant) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?participant rdf:type :Listener}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?pcn 

WHERE {?pc rdf:type :Program_Committee; rdfs:label ?pcn}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?pc) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?pc rdf:type :Program_Committee}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?paper rdf:type :Paper}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?pc) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?pc rdf:type :Author_of_paper_student}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?conf) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?conf rdf:type :Conference}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?paper rdf:type :Paper . 

	?person rdf:type :Author; :submit ?paper}
sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM papers  
	JOIN paper_author ON papers.id = paper_author.pid  
	JOIN authors ON paper_author.aid = authors.id  
	JOIN persons ON authors.id = persons.id

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?name 

WHERE {?p rdf:type :Person; :Name ?name}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?auth) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?auth rdf:type :Author}

sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
 FROM program_committees NATURAL JOIN committees  
		JOIN conferences ON committees.committee  
			= conferences.id

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?dt 

WHERE {?c rdf:type :Conference; :Start_of_conference ?dt}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?text 

WHERE {?rev rdf:type :Review; :hasText ?text}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT ?email 

WHERE {?p rdf:type :Person; :E-mail ?email}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://sigkdd#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?paper rdf:type :Paper . 

	?person rdf:type :Author; :submit ?paper}
sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM papers  
	JOIN paper_author ON papers.id = paper_author.pid  
	JOIN authors ON paper_author.aid = authors.id  
	JOIN persons ON authors.id = persons.id
